---
title: "Companion Report: Replica Afzal UAE"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

# Project scope

This companion report documents the same topic as the core report in `paper/replication_report.qmd`: replication of Siddiqui and Afzal on UAE sectoral diversification, DEA audit, and Ecuador extension.

# Core files

- `src/hhi.py`
- `src/compare_hhi.py`
- `src/run_dea_analysis.py`
- `src/ecuador_hhi.py`
- `src/ecuador_dea.py`
- `src/ecuador_sector_dea.py`
- `src/build_publication_tables.py`

# Journal target

Target journal: MLAJ.

Latindex inclusion: `PENDIENTE_VERIFICAR`.

# Integrity note

Do not report any metric not present in `outputs/` or `paper/`.
